description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this spinn Newport shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetics. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed casual shoe in black and light grey with a flat heel and lace-up fastening with thick, wax-coated laces for slip free knottingLeather and suede upper with overlaysWell padded collar and tongue (with branding)EVA padded midsole with foxing at the toe and back foot regionTPR outsole with patterned groovesMaterial and CareLeather and syntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth or leather brush
